summary: Regression smoke after env-var resilience change (DB_NAME default + auto JWT_SECRET). Backend boots cleanly, all auth/admin/employee endpoints behave as expected, frontend admin + employee flows render and CSV download works.
passed: Supervisor backend log shows 'Startup complete: indexes ensured and seeds run.' (latest entry 2026-06-29 15:55:56)
Admin Bearer: GET /api/auth/me -> 200, GET /api/admin/dashboard -> 200, GET /api/admin/tasks/export.csv -> 200 with CSV body
UI: Admin login redirects to /admin; KPIs (Employees/Total Tasks/Completed/Hours Logged), Workload bar chart, Status donut, and employee section render
UI: Export CSV button on /admin triggered browser download (taskflow-tasks-20260629-155727.csv)
UI: Employee login redirects to /tasks; Kanban shows three columns (To Do 0 / In Progress 3 / Done 2) with seeded tasks
No JWT_SECRET warning emitted in current runtime logs (JWT_SECRET env var is set, as expected)
notes: Older backend.err.log lines containing KeyError: 'JWT_SECRET' are from prior runs before the fix; the latest startup is clean.
Could not simulate JWT_SECRET-absent case without restarting the process; behavior verified via code review reference only.
